TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Paljur == u sulit nu Hulam: Tjura'aljadjuÁöÑÂú∞Êñπ,‰∏¶ËàáÁî±Takamimura : u siwkay nu niyazu' i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Paljur. u kasalumaluma' nu Paljur sa, 50 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 148 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 141 ku tademaw, pakalatu 95%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 7 ku tademaw, pakalatu 5%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Paywan(Paiwan) 86%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, zumazuma 2%. u niyazu' nu Paywan u Paywan a niyazu' kuyni. tuud ku Paywan a tademaw itiniay a niyazu'. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayay ku Sakizaya itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Yuwatan. u cidekay nu Taywan a Incumin: u Sakizaya a binacadan azihan i u Pangcah(Amis) a binacadan azihan i u Tayal a binacadan azihan i u Paywan a binacadan azihan i u Bunun a binacadan azihan i u Piyuma a binacadan azihan i u Rukay a binacadan azihan i u Takuku a binacadan azihan i u Sejek a binacadan azihan i u Saysia a binacadan azihan i u Kabalan a binacadan azihan i u Kanakanabu a binacadan azihan i u Laaluwa a binacadan azihan i u Saw a binacadan azihan i u Chou a binacadan azihan i u Tau a binacadan azihan i
S.PHON: == par~…æjur == u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam: tjura î~ °ar~…æjadju***,***takamimura : u siwkaj nu nijazu î~ ° i pi≈ãtu≈ã a kuwan nu kar~…æinku ku nijazu î~ ° nu par~…æjur. u kasar~…æumar~…æuma î~ ° nu par~…æjur sa, ** ku r~…æuma î~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…æan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…æan nu i≈ã ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…æatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku i≈ã ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…æatu *%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, pajwan(paiwan) **%, juwatan(bunun) *%, zumazuma *%. u nijazu î~ ° nu pajwan u pajwan a nijazu î~ ° kujni. tuud ku pajwan a tad…ômaw itiniaj a nijazu î~ °. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inajaj ku sakizaja itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u juwatan. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan a in ¶umin: u sakizaja a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u pa≈ã ¶aƒß(amis) a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u tajar~…æ a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u pajwan a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u bunun a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u pijuma a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u *ukaj a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u takuku a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u s…ôj…ôk a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u sajsia a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u kabar~…æan a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u kanakanabu a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u r~…æaar~…æuwa a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u saw a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u ¶ƒßou a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u tau a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i
S.FORM: == Paljur == u sulit nu Hulam: Tjura'aljadjuÁöÑÂú∞Êñπ,‰∏¶ËàáÁî±Takamimura : u siwkay nu niyazu' i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Paljur. u kasalumaluma' nu Paljur sa, 50 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 148 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 141 ku tademaw, pakalatu 95%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 7 ku tademaw, pakalatu 5%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Paywan(Paiwan) 86%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, zumazuma 2%. u niyazu' nu Paywan u Paywan a niyazu' kuyni. tuud ku Paywan a tademaw itiniay a niyazu'. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayay ku Sakizaya itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Yuwatan. u cidekay nu Taywan a Incumin: u Sakizaya a binacadan azihan i u Pangcah(Amis) a binacadan azihan i u Tayal a binacadan azihan i u Paywan a binacadan azihan i u Bunun a binacadan azihan i u Piyuma a binacadan azihan i u Rukay a binacadan azihan i u Takuku a binacadan azihan i u Sejek a binacadan azihan i u Saysia a binacadan azihan i u Kabalan a binacadan azihan i u Kanakanabu a binacadan azihan i u Laaluwa a binacadan azihan i u Saw a binacadan azihan i u Chou a binacadan azihan i u Tau a binacadan azihan i
S.PHON: == par~…æjur == u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam: tjura î~ °ar~…æjadju***,***takamimura : u siwkaj nu nijazu î~ ° i pi≈ãtu≈ã a kuwan nu kar~…æinku ku nijazu î~ ° nu par~…æjur. u kasar~…æumar~…æuma î~ ° nu par~…æjur sa, ** ku r~…æuma î~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…æan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…æan nu i≈ã ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…æatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku i≈ã ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…æatu *%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, pajwan(paiwan) **%, juwatan(bunun) *%, zumazuma *%. u nijazu î~ ° nu pajwan u pajwan a nijazu î~ ° kujni. tuud ku pajwan a tad…ômaw itiniaj a nijazu î~ °. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inajaj ku sakizaja itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u juwatan. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan a in ¶umin: u sakizaja a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u pa≈ã ¶aƒß(amis) a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u tajar~…æ a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u pajwan a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u bunun a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u pijuma a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u *ukaj a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u takuku a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u s…ôj…ôk a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u sajsia a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u kabar~…æan a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u kanakanabu a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u r~…æaar~…æuwa a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u saw a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u ¶ƒßou a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u tau a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i
